summary: Joel Spolsky announces the launch of fogcreek.de, Fog Creek Software's first international distributor based in Munich. The site offers full-service sales and support for FogBugz in German. He describes this as a major milestone for the company and encourages German-speaking users in Germany, Austria, and Switzerland to reach out to their local contact Branimir.
key_points: Fog Creek launched its first international distributor in Munich, Germany
FogBugz now supports both English and German language options based on user preference
The distributor covers the DACH region: Germany, Austria, and Switzerland
money_quotes: This is our first real international distributor, and a major milestone for Fog Creek Software.
key_insight: Fog Creek Software reached a growth milestone by establishing its first international distribution presence in the German-speaking market.
